``` Summary: Composite materials contain both soft and hard elements which require gentle treatment to prevent surface scratches while polishing. Proper selection and use of appropriate polishing tools are crucial given their varied abrasive properties. ``` 

The summary focuses on the core issue—varying component hardness—and highlights the need for care when selecting and using polishers. It maintains brevity while capturing essential information pertinent to effective management of this problem.
